title: ferray-core: no concatenate/stack/split in core
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.concatenate, np.stack, np.vstack, np.hstack, np.split, np.array_split are in numpy._core (shape_base.py, fromnumeric.py). These are fundamental array assembly/disassembly operations. ferray-core has manipulation/mod.rs and manipulation/extended.rs but check whether concatenate, stack, and split are fully implemented with broadcasting and dtype promotion. If they're missing or incomplete, they should be in ferray-core since they're needed before any higher-level crate.
